# Additional Information

Include any information that may help reproduce or diagnose the issue.

Examples:

- Screenshots
- Logs
- Configuration
- Build flags
- Hardware information
- Related issues

---

# Checklist

Before submitting, please confirm:

- [ ] I searched existing issues.
- [ ] I am using a supported version of SageLang.
- [ ] I included a minimal reproducible example.
- [ ] I included compiler or runtime output where applicable.
- [ ] This is not a duplicate of an existing issue.
- [ ] This is not a security vulnerability (security issues should be reported privately).

---

# Notes

Please keep bug reports focused on a single issue. Separate, unrelated problems should be reported in separate issues.

Thank you for helping improve SageLang!
